name: local-terminal
description: Audited Windows shell access for Claude. Three-tier security model with 80+ hard-blocked patterns, full audit logging, and dry-run preview for destructive commands.
long_description: Local Terminal gives Claude audited, security-hardened access to your Windows shell. Every command is classified RED (hard-blocked), AMBER (dry-run preview required), or GREEN (auto-execute). Over 80 patterns are permanently blocked including network exfiltration, credential theft, registry tampering, and process injection. A tamper-evident audit log records every tool call. Runs entirely on your machine -- no data leaves your computer.

lt_license_key.title: ForgeRift License Key
lt_license_key.description: Your ForgeRift subscription key, sent to you by email after subscribing at forgerift.io.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Required for Layer 3 AI-assisted command analysis. Get yours at console.anthropic.com.
